mdRecord.dcterms:title: James C. Biddle to Gertrude G. Biddle, December 18, 1864
mdRecord.dcterms:description: Major James C. Biddle writes to Gertrude G. Biddle from Head Quarters, Army of the Potomac, discussing a salute in honor of Thomas's victory, Biddle's pay, and his desire to be with Gertrude again.
mdRecord.dcterms:subject: Civil War
United States--History--Civil War, 1861-2014
mdRecord.dcterms:provenance: Virginia Polytechnic Institute and State University. University Libraries
mdRecord.dcterms:creator: Biddle, James C.
